summary: Classified the ten hydrated open PRs independently for this live inventory shard. No shared canonical was selected. Two validator-flagged security-sensitive PRs are quarantined with exact-ref route_security actions. No close, merge, fix, or low-signal actions are planned because the artifact disables instant close, low-signal PR closeout, merge, and fix PR creation, and the remaining hydrated evidence shows useful contributor work or unresolved proof/review gates rather than boringly closable PRs.
